title: LEWIS & CLARK COMMUNITY COUNSELING CENTER - 211info
text: LEWIS AND CLARK COMMUNITY COUNSELING CENTER LEWIS & CLARK COMMUNITY COUNSELING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers individual, couples, family, and group counseling and therapy for people of all ages facing mental health, addiction, and relationship challenges. Offers treatment for individuals and families dealing with problematic gambling behaviors. All therapeutic services are strictly confidential. The Center is not a crisis intervention facility and does not provide medication management, but appropriate referrals will be given. 4445 SW Barbur Boulevard Suites 107, 205 Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-9pm, Saturday 10am-3pm Email (503) 768-6320 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 768-6320 Main phone (503) 768-6325 Problem Gambling Services Main phone (503) 768-6320 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for initial phone screening or submit online form on website FEES: Initial assessment: $15 Sliding scale: $10-$75 per session. Financial hardship taken into consideration. Sliding scale fee is discussed during initial phone screening. Private pay: Online credit/debit payments DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located near downtown Portland, at the same location as the Confederated Tribes of Grand Ronde. Accessible by public transposition and bicycle routes. Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Conjoint Counseling Family Counseling Group Counseling Individual Counseling Internet Addiction Counseling Marriage and Relationships Counseling Substance Use Disorder Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - LEWIS & CLARK PROBLEM GAMBLING SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LEWIS AND CLARK COMMUNITY COUNSELING CENTER
